nasb.text: took the branches of the palm trees and went out to meet Him, and began to shout, “Hosanna! Blessed is He who comes in the name of the Lord, even the King of Israel.”

esv.text: So they took branches of palm trees and went out to meet him, crying out, “Hosanna! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord, even the King of Israel!”

cnv.text: 就拿著棕樹枝出去迎接他，歡呼說： “和散那， 奉主名來的以色列王， 是應當稱頌的！”

ccb.text: 就拿着棕树枝出去迎接祂，并且高声欢呼： “和散那！ 奉主名来的以色列王当受称颂！”

csbs.text: 就拿着棕榈树枝出去迎接他，欢呼说： “和散那！ 奉主名而来的那一位， 以色列的王啊， 是蒙祝福的！”
